name: create_product
description: Create a new product or service entry for a business. Products can be used as line items when creating invoices. Set isSold to true for income items and isBought for expense items.

parameters.name: businessId
parameters.description: The ID of the business to create the product in.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the product or service.

parameters.name: unitPrice
parameters.description: The unit price of the product.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the product or service.

parameters.name: isSold
parameters.description: Whether this product is sold to customers (income item).

body.query: mutation($input: ProductCreateInput!) { productCreate(input: $input) { product { id name unitPrice description } didSucceed inputErrors { path message code } } }
